nodes.label: This is NOT the Next.js you know
nodes.norm_label: this is not the next.js you know

nodes.label: Online University - Main Documentation
nodes.rationale: Web platform for learning organized as Schools → Classes → Lectures, with built-in AI Course Builder for content creation

nodes.label: Cost Minimization Design
nodes.rationale: Agent built to minimize dollar cost: claude-haiku-4-5 (cheapest model), terse system prompt with injected catalog (saves lookup round-trip), tool results return bare IDs (no echoing), content generated once as structured tool input, capped max_tokens and loop iterations

nodes.label: Bite-Size Card Learning Design
nodes.rationale: Platform built for people with short attention spans - bite-size cards with front (concept), back (explanation), and example (real-world use-case); every card has a concrete example to ground learning

nodes.label: Extensible Lecture Formats via JSON Content Column
nodes.rationale: lectures.format supports cards (default), reading, video, game; content stored in JSON column (lib/types.ts → LectureContent), enabling additive format changes without schema migrations
nodes.norm_label: extensible lecture formats via json content column

nodes.label: Single-User by Design
nodes.rationale: Authentication is out of scope; platform is single-user only
